name: Sekolah Cita Buana

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Paso No.84, Jagakarsa, Jakarta Selatan 12620, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Sekolah Cita Buana stands out for its genuine commitment to inclusive education - it is one of the few schools that truly welcomes children with diverse learning needs.
paragraphs: Parents say Sekolah Cita Buana stands out for its genuine commitment to inclusive education - it is one of the few schools that truly welcomes children with diverse learning needs.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.5K – US$5.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Jagakarsa campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Arts rooms.
